description:
2024 BMW X4 M40i, 3.0 TC I6, 4WD, 382bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 239,000 or AED 3,744 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - ⁠Mileage only 43,192 KMs - ⁠Full BMW Service History -⁠ ⁠BMW Warranty valid November 2028 or 200,000kms -⁠ ⁠BMW Service Contract valid November 2028 or 100,000 KMs - ⁠GCC specification -⁠ ⁠Price includes VAT 
 -⁠ 48V Mild Hybrid Battery - Remote Engine Start - 20” Alloy Wheels - Steering Wheel Heating - Run Flat Tyres - M Sport Differential - Adaptive M Suspension - Comfort Access System - M Sport Brake, Red High-Gloss - Roof Rails High-Gloss Shadow Line - M Carbon Mirror Caps - BMW Individual Shadow Line Lights - M Carbon Spoiler - Panorama Glass Roof - Seat Adjustment Electric with Memory - Sport Seats F Driver/front Passenger - M Seat Belts - Interior Trim Finishers Carbon Fibre - Ambient Air Package - Ambient Light - Active Protection - Harman/Kardon Surround Sound System - Apple CarPlay - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - BMW Gesture Control - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Aerodynamics Package - M Sport Edition
